'''Rin Hawaz''' was an officer serving with the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]], specifically the [[Special Threats Division]], having attained the rank of [[Major/Legends|major]]. As an Intelligence agent, Hawaz spent time investigating the effects of the [[Historical Battle Site Preservation Act]] and [[Operation Flotsam]].

{{Char-stub}}
